666dd9b79eecebab6bedb1d83b0a43ed4cffa8c1: A close-up view of a modern glass facade with a grid of metallic horizontal and vertical frames. 51d88b4c6f0784e9220ec451f732511927586077: A cozy and stylish living room scene featuring a vintage black upright piano with the brand "Bogart Piano Co. New York" visible on the inside of the lid. The piano is positioned against a light-colored wall, with a round mirror hanging above it and a stack of books placed on top. To the left of the piano, there is a classic Eames lounge chair and ottoman in rich brown leather, with a sleek metal base. The chair is situated on a vibrant red and black patterned Persian rug. On either side of the piano, there are potted plants: a tall fiddle leaf fig in a woven basket on the left and a snake plant in a gray ceramic pot on the right. The room is illuminated by natural light streaming through large windows with sheer white curtains, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A small green fan is also visible on top of the piano, adding a touch of retro charm.
43bf27f523b61baf6bfb93e8edddab6aebc4e8f6: A serene and atmospheric scene featuring two small glass candle holders with lit tea lights placed on a weathered, rough stone windowsill.
